description: You are selecting targets for a Multi-Object Spectroscopy (MOS) observation using the FITS image of globular cluster NGC 6652 located at ~/AstroImages/mos_planning/ngc6652_555wmos.fits. Document 8 isolated target stars, ensuring no two stars are within 100 pixels of each other. Use circular ROIs with a diameter of 10 pixels (radius 5) centered on each star. Export a measurement file containing the Area, Mean gray value, and Centroid for all 8 targets to ~/AstroImages/mos_planning/mos_targets.csv and save the set of 8 ROIs to ~/AstroImages/mos_planning/mos_targets.zip.
